revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:縣神社 (岐阜市)]] {{Expand Japanese|縣神社 (岐阜市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Agata Shrine (Gifu) | native_name = 縣神社 (岐阜市) | image = Agata jinja.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Agata Shrine (Gifu) | coordinates = {{coord|35.5196|136.7187528}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Agata Shrine (Gifu)'''|縣神社 (岐阜市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11609223|ltq=Q11609223|qid=Q11609223|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mino Province}} ** Series ordinal: 16 ** P155: {{ill|Kiburi Shrine|lt=Kiburi Shrine|ja|来振神社|qid=Q11523697|1=Kiburi Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11616586|ltq=Q11616586|qid=Q11616586|1=Wakae Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Gifu|lt=Gifu|an|Gifu|ar|غيفو (غيفو)|arz|جيفو (تجمع سكان فى اليابان)|azb|قیفو (شهر)|az|Gifu|ban|Gifu, Gifu|be|Гіфу (горад)|bg|Гифу (град)|bn|গিফু|bs|Gifu|ca|Gifu|ceb|Gifu-shi (kapital sa prepektura)|ce|Гифу (гӀала)|cs|Gifu|de|Gifu|devoyage|Gifu|en|Gifu|envoyage|Gifu|eo|Gifu|es|Gifu (Gifu)|et|Gifu|eu|Gifu|fa|گیفو (شهر)|fi|Gifu|fr|Gifu (Gifu)|frvoyage|Gifu|ga|Gifu|gl|Gifu|he|גיפו|hu|Gifu|hy|Գիֆու (քաղաք)|id|Gifu, Gifu|idvoyage|Gifu|ilo|Gifu|is|Gifu|it|Gifu|ja|岐阜市|javoyage|岐阜市|ka|გიფუ (ქალაქი)|kk|Гифу|ko|기후시|ky|Гифу|lt|Gifu|lv|Gifu|mdf|Гифу (ошсь)|mg|Gifu-shi|mzn|گیفو (شهر)|nl|Gifu (stad)|no|Gifu (Gifu)|pl|Gifu|plvoyage|Gifu|pms|Gifu|pt|Gifu (cidade)|ro|Gifu|ru|Гифу (город)|sco|Gifu|sc|Gifu|sh|Gifu|simple|Gifu|sr|Гифу|su|Gifu, Gifu|sv|Gifu|sw|Gifu, Gifu|ta|கிஃபு|tg|Гифу|th|กิฟุ (เมือง)|tl|Gifu|tr|Gifu|tt|Гифу (шәһәр)|uk|Ґіфу|ur|گیفو، گیفو|uz|Gifu|vi|Gifu (thành Province|es|Provincia de Mino|eu|Mino probintzia|fa|ولایت مینو|fr|Province de Mino|gl|Provincia de Mino|hak|Mî-nùng-koet|id|Provinsi Mino|it|Mino (provincia)|ja|美濃国|ko|미노국|lt|Mino žemė|nl|Mino (provincie)|pt|Província de Mino|ru|Мино (провинция)|simple|Mino Province|sk|Mino (provincia)|sr|Провинција Мино|th|แคว้นมิโนะ|tr|Mino (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Міно|vi|Tỉnh Mino|wuu|美濃国|zh_min_nan|Mino-kok|zh_yue|美濃國|zh|美濃國|qid=Q864156|1=Mino Province}} * {{ill|Katagata district|lt=Katagata district|ja|方県郡|zh|方縣郡|qid=Q11504366|1=Katagata district}} == coordinate location Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5200005000219 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Kataakatatsuno Shrine|lt=Kataakatatsuno Shrine|qid=Q135039902|1=Kataakatatsuno Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県岐阜市佐野728-1', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '岐阜県岐阜市曽我屋', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:縣神社 (岐阜市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11608141}} == Japanese content == {{Source citation| date = October 2024}} {{Shrine |Name=Agata Shrine |Image=[[File:Agata jinja.JPG|250px|Agata Shrine main hall]]
Worship hall |Location={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Gifu City|Q45798|qid=Q45798|1=Gifu}} Sano 728-1 |Coordinates={{WikiCoordinates2DMS|35|31|10.56|N|136|43|7.51|E|scale:30000}} |Enshrined deity=Agata Ōkami |Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor) |Founded=Unknown |Main hall= |Annual festival= |Rituals= |Map= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Agata Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Agata Shrine''' (あがたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Gifu City|Q45798|qid=Q45798|1=Gifu}}. It is identified as Katagata-tsu Shrine of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|qid=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}{{ill|lt=Katagata District|Q11504366|qid=Q11504366|1=Katagata district}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Engishiki|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. However, regarding Katagata-tsu Shrine of Katagata District in Mino Province, there are several other candidate shrines (ronsha), such as {{ill|lt=Tsu Shrine|Q11556358|qid=Q11556358|1=Tsu Shrine}} and {{ill|lt=Katagata-tsu Shrine|Q11504365|qid=Q11504365|1=Katagatatsu Shrine}}. It is located in the northwestern part of Gifu City, near the boundary between {{ill|lt=Yamagata District (Gifu Prefecture)|Q8047620|qid=Q8047620|lt=Yamagata District|1=Yamagata District, Gifu}} of Mino Province and Katagata District. The date of founding is unknown, but based on the dates inscribed on stone pillars and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=stone lanterns|1=UNKNOWN}}, it is presumed that the shrine was already established at this site during the {{ill|lt=Tenpō era|Q1369045|qid=Q1369045|1=Tenpō}} ({{ill|lt=1830|Q7576|qid=Q7576|1=1830}}–{{ill|lt=1843|Q7629|qid=Q7629|1=1843}}). === Enshrined deities === === Principal deity === *Agata Ōkami :Details are unknown. Various theories identify this deity as Kunisazuchi-no-Mikoto, {{ill|lt=Amatsuhikone|Q10940228|qid=Q10940228|lt=Amatsuhikone-no-Mikoto|1=Amatsuhikone}}, or {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sukunahikona-no-Mikoto|1=Sukunabikona|qid=Q3275687}}. === Enshrined together === *{{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi}} *{{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami}} *{{ill|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|Amaterasu Ōmikami|qid=|simple|Amaterasu Ōmikami}} *{{ill|lt=Kikuri-hime-no-Kami|Q11619891|qid=Q11619891|lt=Kikuri-hime-no-Kami|1=Kikurihime}} *{{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Takehayasusanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} *Hayatama-no-O-no-Mikoto *Kumano Kusumi-no-Kami *{{ill|lt=Kumano Gongen|Q11568925|qid=Q11568925|lt=Ketsumiko-no-Kami|1=Kumano Gongen}} === Transportation === *From the “Ijira Yotsutsuji” bus stop on the Ijira Line of {{ill|lt=Gifu Bus|Q5560101|qid=Q5560101|lt=Gifu Bus|1=Gifu Bus}}, approximately a 30-minute walk === Notes === {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Agata Shrine (Gifu)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Agata Shrine (Gifu)]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]]
